title: Power Of Youth
content:
And they remember
    With piercing untold anguish
    The proud boasting of their youth.
    And they feel how Nature was fair.
    And the mists of delusion,
    And the scales of habit,
    Fall away from their eyes
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Matthew Arnold delivers a powerful performance in "Power Of Youth"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
